mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_meeting WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_meeting WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM t_meeting WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND start_time >= #{start} AND start_time <= #{end}
SELECT * FROM t_meeting WHERE status = #{status} AND start_time <= #{threshold}
SELECT * FROM t_meeting WHERE status = #{status} AND end_time <= #{threshold}
